a.label: holonomy channel K_hol
a.standard_term: closure residue of a discrete cycle of inverse-function transports (holonomy by analogy, not fiber-bundle holonomy)

b.label: Spectral channel K_spec
b.standard_term: spectrum (eigenvalues/singular values/transfer function) of the linearized coupling map at the operating point, i.e. classical operator spectral data
